Description: Main gate of the cluster/property showing branding and security
Notes: Shoot from car perspective entering for immersive feel

Description: Full front view of the house showing architectural design
Notes: Low angle makes house look grander. Shoot both straight-on and 45-degree

Description: The street/corridor of the cluster showing neighborhood feel
Camera Movement: Walking gimbal shot or drone tracking
Notes: Best shot early morning when streets are empty and clean

Description: Main living area showing space and natural light
Camera Movement: Gimbal push-in from entrance or pan left-to-right
Notes: Open all curtains for maximum natural light. Remove clutter.

Description: Dining space showing connection to kitchen and living
Notes: Style with table setting if available for lifestyle feel

Description: Kitchen area showing cabinets countertops and appliances
Camera Movement: Slow dolly shot along counter or push-in
Notes: Ensure all cabinet doors closed. Show storage solutions.

Description: Master bedroom showing space wardrobe area and natural light
Camera Movement: Push-in from door or slow pan revealing space
Notes: Make bed neat. Open curtains halfway for cinematic light.

Description: Additional bedrooms showing versatility
Notes: Show different use cases: kids room office guest room

Description: Bathroom showing fixtures finishes and space
Camera Movement: Slow reveal from mirror or push-in from door
Notes: Ensure dry and clean. Turn on warm lights for ambiance.

Description: Rear garden or outdoor space
Notes: Morning light best for green vibrancy

Description: Community clubhouse showing amenities
Notes: Show both exterior and key interior areas

Description: Pool area showing size and surroundings
Notes: Morning before 9am for clear water reflection and no crowd

Description: Children play area showing equipment and safety
Notes: Best with children playing (get parent permission) or early morning

Description: Running/walking path showing landscape
Notes: Show greenery alongside track. Runner if available.

Description: Gate security CCTV showing safety features
Notes: Show 24hr security presence and technology

Description: Main road leading to the property area
Notes: Show road quality width and traffic condition at peak hours

Description: Secondary road from main road to cluster entrance
Notes: Show distance and condition. Note landmarks for directions.

Description: Nearest mall market or commercial center
Notes: Show variety: mall minimarket restaurants. Note distance.

Description: Nearby traditional market for daily needs
Notes: Show freshness and accessibility for daily shopping

Description: Schools in the area (SD SMP SMA International)
Notes: Capture school name and facade. Show proximity to cluster.

Description: Higher education institutions nearby
Notes: Important for investment/kost potential content

Description: Nearest hospital or clinic
Notes: Show name and 24hr sign. Note distance in post.

Description: Nearest station bus stop or angkot route
Camera Movement: Show station entrance or bus stop
Notes: Show KRL station MRT LRT or bus stop. Capture crowd for credibility.

Description: Nearest toll gate showing connectivity
Notes: Show toll name and capture the drive approach

Description: New roads being built showing area growth
Notes: Shows future potential and development commitment

Description: Dining and lifestyle options nearby
Notes: Show variety and quality of lifestyle options

Description: Parks and recreation options
Notes: Golf course waterpark nature spots etc.

Description: Developer branded entrance showing professionalism
Notes: Clean well-maintained gate shows developer quality and commitment

Description: Billboards banners flags showing active marketing
Notes: Shows developer is actively selling and investing in brand

Description: Developer sales gallery showing professionalism
Notes: Clean professional gallery indicates serious developer

Description: Furnished show unit showing quality standard
Camera Movement: Full tour gimbal push-in room by room
Notes: Key selling tool. Shoot comprehensively with detail shots.

Description: Close-up of material quality workmanship
Notes: Show wall finish tile alignment paint quality plumbing electrical

Description: Ongoing construction showing active development
Notes: Shows project is active and on schedule. Good for trust building.

Description: Display of developer certifications and awards
Notes: REI membership ISO certifications awards etc.

Description: Existing residential area showing livability
Notes: Shows track record. Best during morning/evening activity times.

Description: Before-after or development comparison showing growth
Camera Movement: Side by side or drone showing development
Notes: Use Google Maps historical or collect before-after photos from developer

Description: New commercial or residential projects nearby
Notes: Multiple new projects = area confidence indicator

Description: New roads tolls or public transport being built
Notes: New infrastructure = guaranteed price increase

Description: Visual showing distance to key points
Notes: Create in post-production with distance markers and drive time

Description: New malls offices or retail showing economic activity
Camera Movement: Drone and ground level commercial area
Notes: Commercial growth = residential demand increase

Description: Nearby office centers showing employment opportunity
Notes: Shows rental demand potential for investment buyers

Description: Visual showing price appreciation over time
Notes: Create compelling price growth chart with source data

Description: Visual breakdown of investment return
Notes: Compare: rental yield capital gain and total ROI

Description: Evidence of growing population and demand
Camera Movement: Data graphic or visual of new communities
Notes: Census data or school enrollment data as proxy

Description: Evidence of rental demand in area
Notes: Show Airbnb/OLX listings and rental rates nearby

Description: Host presents the problem being discussed
Notes: Clean background good lighting. Speak directly to camera with energy.

Description: Host presents the solution or tip
Camera Movement: Same framing as problem with confident delivery
Notes: Change energy from problem (concern) to solution (confidence)

Description: Host introduces the property being reviewed
Camera Movement: Medium shot with property visible behind
Notes: Stand in front of property gate or facade for context

Description: Host highlights USP of property
Camera Movement: Medium shot with gestures toward features
Notes: Point to actual features while explaining. Walk and talk style.

Description: Host delivers the CTA to audience
Notes: Warm genuine smile. Speak directly and clearly. End with pointing gesture.

Description: Host delivers comedy premise
Camera Movement: Medium or close-up with expressive face
Notes: Exaggerated expressions for comedy. Hold beat for timing.

Description: Host delivers the punchline or twist
Camera Movement: Same or tighter framing with reaction
Notes: Quick cut timing. Reaction should be genuine feeling.

Description: High altitude overview showing entire development
Notes: Fly at golden hour for best color. Check flight restrictions.

Description: Low altitude reveal of specific unit
Notes: Start low behind trees or fence then rise to reveal unit

Description: High altitude showing surrounding area and connectivity
Camera Movement: Slow pan or orbit showing context
Notes: Show relationship between property and nearby amenities/roads

Description: Directly overhead shot of pool/garden/facility
Notes: Perfect for pools parks and symmetrical layouts

Description: Tracking someone walking or driving into property
Notes: Creates immersive entry experience. Coordinate with talent.
